content: permission_handler 11.4.0 exposes Permission.status values including granted, denied, restricted, permanentlyDenied, limited, and provisional. Calling request() on a Permission requests it and returns the resulting PermissionStatus; requesting multiple permissions returns a map keyed by Permission. The package documentation distinguishes runtime permission status from associated service status. On Android 10+, locationAlways cannot be requested directly before locationWhenInUse is granted; the foreground permission must be requested first and the background permission requested afterwards.
